_note: AVATAR training cost, MEASURED by us on 2026-07-07 from the ProminentLab/AVATAR rebuild. Supersedes the unbacked 14400s (4h) Fig 8 anchor and the '60 CPU-hours' report claim, both partner-provenance. The 4h is a GPU number; this is CPU, the same hardware class as the rest of the benchmark.
hardware: CHARLES, avatar-cpu docker image (TensorFlow 1.15.5, CPU-only), ~5.6 cores in use, 3.8 GHz

quick_anchor_measured.model_quality: undertrained by design; ranked models score TP=0 (pipeline verification only)

projection_full_published.note_adv: 5000 steps x 45.11 s/step, linear and rigorously measured
projection_full_published.total_wall_est: ~3 to 4 days per log on this CPU
projection_full_published.gpu_reference: authors report ~hours on GPU (Theis & Darabi 2020); we have no TF1/Blackwell GPU path
